name: Cable One, Inc.
summary: Cable One, Inc. (doing business as Sparklight) is a broadband communications provider serving approximately 1.0 million residential and business customers across 24 Western, Midwestern, and Southern states. The company delivers data, video, and voice services via fiber-to-the-premises and hybrid fiber-coaxial networks, focusing primarily on residential data (60.1% of revenues), business data (15.3%), and residential video (12.5%) in non-metropolitan, secondary, and tertiary markets.

products.name: Residential Data (Internet)
products.description: High-speed broadband internet service delivered via fiber or HFC network, offering some of the fastest speeds in their markets.

products.name: Business Data
products.description: Data connectivity services targeting small, enterprise, and wholesale business customers with high-margin products.

products.name: Residential Video
products.description: Traditional and IPTV video service, including Sparklight TV, a cloud-based internet protocol video streaming service.

products.name: Residential Voice
products.description: Residential voice services, experiencing declining revenues due to increasing use of wireless alternatives.

products.name: Intelligent Wi-Fi
products.description: Wi-Fi service offering for residential data customers, part of growing related services.

products.name: Network Security Solutions
products.description: Security solutions offered as a related service alongside residential data subscriptions.

products.name: Mobile Service (Pilot)
products.description: Pilot mobile service offering launched in Q4 2025 via a mobile virtual network enabler in select markets.

products.name: Sparklight TV
products.description: IPTV video service allowing customers to stream video channels from the cloud via the Sparklight TV app.

partnerships.description: Partnership to launch a pilot mobile service offering in several Cable One markets during Q4 2025.
